channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: US sanctions Sudan for chemical weapons
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The US has imposed new sanctions on Sudan, accusing its government of using chemical weapons in the ongoing war. Learn about the impact of these US sanctio
Read More: https://punchng.com/us-sanctions-sudan-for-chemical-weapons/

item.title: Emergency responders contain gas tanker leak in Kaduna
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Emergency responders in Kaduna have successfully contained a compressed gas tanker leak in Kaduna South. No casualties reported in the Kaduna gas leak inci
Read More: https://punchng.com/emergency-responders-contain-gas-tanker-leak-in-kaduna/

item.title: One dies, 39 missing after boat carrying farmers capsizes in Jigawa
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
One person has died and 39 are missing after a boat carrying farmers capsized in Jigawa. Search and rescue operations are ongoing for the Jigawa boat accid
Read More: https://punchng.com/one-dies-39-missing-after-boat-carrying-farmers-capsizes-in-jigawa/

item.title: Fulham latest: Arbeloa plots double raid for Real Madrid duo Mastantuono and Garcia
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football

item.title: VIDEO: Seyi Tinubu, children meet IShowSpeed at World Cup final

item.description:
Watch the viral video of Seyi Tinubu, son of President Bola Tinubu, and his children meeting popular American streamer IShowSpeed at the FIFA Club World Cu
Read More: https://punchng.com/video-seyi-tinubu-children-meet-ishowspeed-at-world-cup-final/

item.title: C’River exempts women, elderly drivers from vehicle registration, levies
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Cross River State offers relief to women and elderly commercial drivers, exempting them from vehicle registration and daily operational levies. Learn more
Read More: https://punchng.com/criver-exempts-women-elderly-drivers-from-vehicle-registration-levies/

item.title: What would a 64-team World Cup look like - and could it work in 2030?
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: This year's World Cup is finally over - and after 48 teams took part, it was a long, long tournament. But just as we bid to say goodbye to the 2026 edition, this competition may be getting even bigger.

item.title: Nigerian students win gold at Spelling Bee World Cup in China
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Nigerian students have won the Gold Award at the 2026 Spelling Bee World Cup in Shanghai, China, making history for the nation. Read more about their victo
Read More: https://punchng.com/nigerian-students-win-gold-at-spelling-bee-world-cup-in-china/

item.title: Annie Idibia dismisses rumours of reunion with ex-husband 2Baba
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Nollywood actress Annie Idibia addresses circulating old videos, dismissing rumours of a reunion with her estranged husband, music star 2Baba. Get the full
Read More: https://punchng.com/annie-idibia-dismisses-rumours-of-reunion-with-ex-husband-2baba/

item.title: Rogers spotted arriving for Chelsea medical ahead of £117m deal
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Morgan Rogers has been spotted arriving for his Chelsea medical after the Blues agreed a £117m deal with Aston Villa.

item.title: Benue APC Crisis: State Assembly Tickets Split Between Akume, Alia Camps
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Amid the protacted crisis rocking the All Progressives Congress (APC) in Benue State, Governor Hyacinth Alia and the secretary to the government of the federation (SGF), George Akume’s camps have shared the 37 State House of Assembly nomination tickets. Governor Alia got 24 APC state Assembly candid

item.title: BREAKING: Court Grants N2bn Bail to Miyetti Allah National President, Bello Badejo
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The court has granted bail to the National President of Miyetti Allah, Bello Badejo, in the sum of N2 billion. The ruling was delivered on Monday. Details later. The post BREAKING: Court Grants N2bn Bail to Miyetti Allah National President, Bello Badejo appeared first on Trending News.

item.title: Imported petrol costlier than local supply – IPMAN tells NMDPRA to review licences
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Independent Petroleum Marketers Association of Nigeria, IPMAN, has urged the Nigerian Midstream and Downstream Petroleum Regulatory Authority, NMDPRA, to review recently issued petrol import licences, arguing that imported fuel is now significantly more expensive than locally refined products. T

item.title: NPFL: Rangers’ Ilechukwu bags UEFA B coaching licence
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Nigeria Premier Football League, NPFL, title-winning coach Fidelis Ilechukwu has successfully obtained his UEFA B Coaching License in Scotland. The Rangers technical adviser completed the course as part of his continued investment in coaching development. Ilechukwu has guided the Flying Antelopes to

item.title: Osinbajo, Sanwo-Olu, Elumelu Honour Alakija At 75th Birthday Thanksgiving, Presentation Of 6 Books
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Billionaire businesswoman, Apostle Folorunso Alakija, at the weekend celebrated her 75th birthday with a grand thanksgiving service in Lagos, where she unveiled six new books. The event attracted an array of distinguished guests from across Nigeria’s political, business and religious circles.

item.title: GTBank Kenya begins search for new MD as Jubril Adeniji returns to Nigeria
item.dc:creator: TechCabal
item.description: His departure comes after a tenure in which GTBank Kenya sought to strengthen its balance sheet and reposition the business for growth.

item.title: International Paper expands board with two new appointments
item.dc:creator: Yahoo Finance

item.title: Annie Idibia breaks silence over alleged reunion with ex-husband 2face
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Nollywood actress, Annie Idibia, has dismissed rumours that she reunited with her estranged husband, music star Innocent Idibia, popularly known as 2face. Annie addressed the speculation in a post shared on her Instagram Stories on Monday. She indicated that videos that led to the rumours were old a

item.title: Atiku seeks probe into ‘unexplained’ N12.8trn in 2026 budget
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Former Vice President and presidential candidate of the African Democratic Congress (ADC), Atiku Abubakar, has The post Atiku seeks probe into ‘unexplained’ N12.8trn in 2026 budget appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Imole Campaign Council (TICC), the campaign organisation of Governor Ademola Adeleke, on Monday called on the Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) to strengthen safeguards ahead of the Osun State governorship election, raising what it described as 10 major concerns from recent off-cy

item.title: APRA re-elects Nigeria’s Ibietan, two others to lead association
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The association renewed the mandate of its top leadership and approved governance reforms aimed at strengthening the organisation’s continental reach and supporting Africa’s digital transformation agenda. The post APRA re-elects Nigeria’s Ibietan, two others to lead association appeared first on Pre

item.title: AEW 2026 to spotlight natural gas as catalyst for Africa’s AI data centre growth
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: AEW 2026 will examine how natural gas can power Africa's AI data centres, strengthen digital infrastructure and drive long-term economic growth. The post AEW 2026 to spotlight natural gas as catalyst for Africa’s AI data centre growth appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: Davido Congratulates Lamine Yamal’s Mother Following Spain’s World Cup Victory
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Popular Afrobeats musician, David Adeleke, widely known as Davido, has sent a congratulatory message to Sheila Ebana, the mother of Spanish football star Lamine Yamal, following Spain’s victory at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.   The singer shared a post on his Instagram story on Monday to cele

item.title: Iran Calls On IAEA To Condemn US Strike On Nuclear Site
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: Iran has called on the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) to condemn a United States missile strike on the under-construction Darkhovin nuclear power plant in southwestern Iran, describing the attack as a violation of international law and a direct assault on a civilian facility under full IA

item.title: Dutch Model Jelicia Westhoff Calls Out Maduka Okoye Over Alleged Assault, Domestic Neglect
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Nigeria’s national team goalkeeper, Maduka Okoye, has found himself at the centre of a severe controversy after his girlfriend and baby mama, Dutch model Jelicia Westhoff, made explosive allegations regarding his private life.   The sudden development unfolded shortly after Okoye was spotted in

item.title: Tinubu’s 2027 re-election not guaranteed, says Ekiti PDP candidate
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) governorship candidate in the 2026 Ekiti State election, Oluwole Oluyede, has said President Bola Tinubu cannot assume victory in the 2027 presidential election based on the All Progressives Congress (APC)'s success in the state's governorship poll. The post Tinubu

item.title: World Cup: 7 European clubs react as Spain beat Argentina to win trophy
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: At least seven European clubs have reacted after Spain defeated Argentina to win the 2026 FIFA World Cup on Sunday. The clubs, which all have players playing for the La Roja, are Athletic Club, Barcelona, Paris Saint-Germain, Manchester City, Real Sociedad, Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. Recall

item.title: Streamer Kai Cenat Sued Over Safety Concerns At Fan Event
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Popular American internet streamer, Kai Cenat, is facing a lawsuit from a fan who claims he nearly suffered heatstroke twice during a public event hosted by the streamer in New York.   According to court documents, the plaintiff, Caleb Gottfried, alleged that unsafe conditions at the event expo

item.title: Taraba High Court judges proceed on annual vacation
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Chief Judge of Taraba State, Justice Joel Agya, has announced the 2026 annual vacation for the state High Courts, scheduled to commence on Monday, Aug. 3, and end on Sunday, Oct. 4, 2026. The announcement was contained in Taraba State Legal Notice No. 3 of 2026 on the Annual Vacation of the High

item.title: Citi Says Magnificent Seven Tag Is Obsolete in AI Stock Winners
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: The popular Magnificent Seven stocks moniker is “no longer relevant” in assessing how to play the US artificial intelligence trade, according to Citigroup Inc. strategists.

item.title: Destiny Etiko laments N5m betting loss after World Cup final
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Nollywood actress Destiny Etiko has disclosed that she lost ₦5 million after placing what she described as her first-ever football bet on the 2026 FIFA World Cup final between Spain and Argentina. The post Destiny Etiko laments N5m betting loss after World Cup final appeared first on The Sun Nigeria

item.title: Enugu’s New Berries Park Demolished
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: Lamentations have trailed the demolition of the New Berries Park located along Enugu-Abakaliki road in Enugu metropolis. It was gathered that the multi-million facilities were pulled down weekend. The popular park shares fences with the Old Government Lodge, Enugu. It occupies a common space where t

item.title: US Widens Strikes In Iran
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: The Middle East war resumed after a weeks-long lull prompted by an agreement signed in June, and oil prices surged to a one-month high as the foes battled to control the vital Strait of Hormuz. The post US Widens Strikes In Iran appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: Ycee opens up on his bipolar treatment journey in Nigeria
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Ycee also spoke about the lack of adequate funding and staffing in the country’s mental healthcare system. He argued that many Nigerians still struggle to access quality medical care.

item.title: Police rescue abducted woman, recover 15 rustled cattle in Katsina
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The police said the separate operations took place in Funtua and Musawa local government areas on 17 and 19 July. The post Police rescue abducted woman, recover 15 rustled cattle in Katsina appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: Teen Dies, Several Injured During World Cup Celebration In Spanish City
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: A 13-year-old is reportedly dead and two people injured after​a fountain partially collapsed in ‌western Spain in the early hours on Monday, marring mass celebrations of the country’s ​second-ever soccer World Cup victory, emergency ​services said. The accident occurred shortly after ⁠midnight

item.title: Is an opportunity to buy chip stocks nearing? These two big Wall Street banks are divided.
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: JPMorgan says a summer buying opportunity is coming for chip stocks, but Morgan Stanley says the sector is in for a hard remainder of 2026.

item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Forum of Zonal Coordinators of the National Association of Nigerian Students (NANS), has warned the National Youth Leader of the The post Take your programme off our campuses, NANS warns APC youth leader appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Atiku exposes N12.8tn allocation allegedly hidden under Tinubu’s government
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Atiku Abubakar, former Vice President of Nigeria and presidential candidate of the African Democratic Congress, ADC, has alleged the existence of a fresh N12.8 trillion hidden allocation in Nigeria’s 2026 budget under President Bola Ahmed Tinubu’s administration. Atiku made this disclosu

item.title: HEDA hails court’s final forfeiture of Aisha Achimugu’s assets
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Human and Environmental Development Agenda (HEDA Resource Centre) has welcomed the Federal High Court’s order granting the final forfeiture of assets linked to businesswoman Aisha Achimugu to the Federal Government. The post HEDA hails court’s final forfeiture of Aisha Achimugu’s assets appeared

item.title: The Next Wave: Why it rained at your favourite cloud kitchen
item.dc:creator: TechCabal
item.description: What FoodCourt got wrong, what Chicken Republic got right, and why cloud kitchens are harder than they look.

item.title: Inflation is broadening out, says Goldman economist
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: During his Congressional testimony last week, new Fed Chair Kevin Warsh emphasized that one of his primary responsibilities was to ensure that individual price spikes, of which there have been many in recent years, “don’t broaden out.” The bad news is that on the whole they are.

item.title: Oil eases after Iran says US contacts continue through mediators
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Oil scaled back gains after hitting its highest price in a month on Monday as Iran said diplomatic exchanges with the United States were ongoing via mediators despite renewed conflict in the Middle East. The post Oil eases after Iran says US contacts continue through mediators appeared first on Vang

item.title: ‎Police Launch Manhunt As Gunmen Attack Female Motorist In Ondo
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Ondo State Police Command has launched a manhunt for three armed men who allegedly attacked a female motorist along the Ondo/Ile-Oluji Road in an attempted robbery, raising fresh concerns over security on the busy highway. ‎The incident occurred at about 6:30 p.m. on Sunday at Otaasan Area, wher

item.description: The self-styled Director-General of the alleged Presidential Foreign Intervention Promotion Council, Prince Adeyemi Matthew Adeniyi, has explained how the fake organisation was captured in the Federal Government's budget despite his arrest before the appropriation process was concluded. The post PFI

item.title: 2026 World Cup: How Europe Thrashed Africa, America, Others
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: Long before any World Cup event happens, Europe has outplayed the rest of the world in the financial field of play. An analysis conducted by THE WHISTLER shows that the 2026 World Cup which concluded in the United States of America on Sunday was not different. Historical positioning, large financial

item.title: UNICAL orders crackdown on wild graduation celebrations, cult activities

item.description:
UNICAL management reiterates ban on wild post-exam celebrations and cult activities. Students warned against reckless conduct to maintain peace on campus.

item.title: We have $8 million in traditional IRAs. Should we tap them to buy a house — and take the tax hit?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “We would rather pay taxes upfront than pay mortgage interest.”

item.title: Hungary PM Magyar proposes chess grandmaster Judit Polgar for president
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar will meet with former chess champion Judit Polgar on Monday to ask her if she will serve as the country's next president. Hungarian lawmakers last week passed an amendment removing the current president from office after Magyar accused him of being a "puppet" of

item.title: Teen dies, several injured during Spain World Cup celebrations

item.description:

item.title: War in Iran expands as third US soldier killed since end of ceasefire
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: A third US soldier has died, this time in Iraq, during what US Central Command called the "controlled detonation" of a downed Iranian drone. It brings the number of US soldiers killed in fighting to 17. This comes as the war in Iran expands following the fallout of a 60-day ceasefire in early July.

item.title: Portable challenges Terry G to boxing match
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The singer described himself as the pioneer of celebrity boxing in Nigeria, claiming that he had earned millions of naira from previous bouts.

item.title: Fans Mourn Messi’s Likely Last World Cup
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Thousands of Argentina supporters paid an emotional tribute to Lionel Messi after the Albiceleste’s 1-0 extra-time defeat to Spain in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final, with many believing the tournament marked the legendary captain’s final appearance on football’s biggest stage. Accor

item.title: Achebe statue funded by community, not Anambra — Soludo’s aide
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Anambra State clarifies that the Chinua Achebe statue in Ogidi was community-funded, not a state project, despite Governor Soludo’s unveiling.

item.description: The S&P 500 is primed to climb during the third, fourth and fifth weeks of the financial reporting period, according to Jefferies.

item.title: No one talks about FAANG anymore. Now, it’s time to retire Magnificent Seven as well, Citigroup argues
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Magnificent Seven as a group is underperforming the broader market this year, but strategists at Citi argue it’s no longer a grouping that even makes sense to think about it.

item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: A suspect allegedly promised parents education for the children but admitted they were being taken for domestic work and child labour. The post Police rescue nine children, arrest suspected traffickers in Niger appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: India found it impossible to dismiss Joe Root across the ODI series as the England batter looted 249 runs without losing his wicket.

item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera

item.title: FX Spot transactions drive Nigeria’s weekly FX turnover 46% higher to $2.39 billion
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: Nigeria's foreign exchange market recorded a sharp rebound in the week ended July 17, 2026, with total turnover rising to $2.386 billion as a surge in spot transactions more than offset a steep decline in derivatives trading. The post FX Spot transactions drive Nigeria’s weekly FX turnover 46%

item.title: The Business of the World Cup Final: The Night Football Becomes Everybody’s Business
item.dc:creator: YNaija
item.description: A single football match can trigger more economic activity across Nigeria than a month of targeted corporate campaigns. The ninety minutes of the World Cup final function as a massive liquidity injection into the local informal economy. Bars and local viewing centres see an immediate explosion in co

item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: Axxela Limited, a leading gas and power portfolio company in sub-Saharan Africa, has announced that GCR has upgraded its long-term issuer rating to A+(NG) and affirmed its short-term issuer rating at A1(NG), with a Stable Outlook.The upgrade reflects Axxela’s robust business model, and strong

item.title: Transfer: Nigerian midfielder moves to Fenerbahçe
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Turkcell Women’s Super League champions, Fenerbahçe have announced the signing of Nigerian midfielder Suliat Abideen, DAILY POST reports. Abideen, who joined the Yellow Canaries from another Turkish club ABB Fomget penned a contract until the end of the season. Her arrival increased the number of Ni

item.title: Senegal President, Faye Elected New ECOWAS Chairman
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Senegal’s President, Bassirou Diomaye Faye, has been elected Chairman of the Authority of Heads of State and Government of the Economic Community of West African States (ECOWAS) at the bloc’s 69th Ordinary Session held in Freetown, Sierra Leone. Faye succeeds Sierra Leone’s Preside

item.title: UK prepares to get its seventh prime minister in a decade
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: After UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer makes his farewell speech ​outside 10 Downing Street on July 20 and formally tenders his resignation to King Charles, Andy Burnham will be received in Buckingham Palace to be made the country's seventh prime minister in a decade. FRANCE 24's Benedicte Paviot tell

item.title: NDC exposes ‘fake deputy publicity secretary’
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Nigeria Democratic Congress, NDC, has publicly disowned Mr Okey Ezeala, warning party members and the general public that he is neither an official nor a representative of the party despite allegedly presenting himself as its Deputy National Publicity Secretary. The party made the clarification

item.title: Andy Burnham set to become UK Prime Minister
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Burnham will then meet the King, who will invite him to form a new government before he returns to Downing Street to deliver his first speech as prime minister.

item.description: This weekend was filled with FIFA World Cup excitement, an unexpected revelation, an historic moment for women in the Nigerian bar association and exciting news from some of our favorite reality stars.  BTS, Shakira, Burna Boy And More Take On The FIFA Halftime Show  The 2026 FIFA World Cu

item.title: Dangote: Nigerians may begin buying fuel, diesel in US dollars – Marketers
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Petroleum products retailers and marketers have said Nigerians may soon begin buying Premium Motor Spirit, PMS, Automotive Gas Oil, AGO, and other refined petroleum products in United States dollars if the Federal Government does not restore the Naira-for-crude deal with Dangote Refinery. The Nation

item.title: 'Absolute joy spilling out' for Spain's 'new golden generation' of football
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: By winning the World Cup final against Argentina, Spain has become the first country to hold the men's and the women's title at the same time. The men's team is now at 38 consecutive successful games, a record. Now, Madrid is preparing for the celebrations that will mark the return of La Roja to its

item.title: The winners are those 'that played football': Spanish fans celebrate World Cup win
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Spain won the World Cup final 1-0 against Argentina. The final was deadlocked until Spain's Ferran Torres scored in extra time. It was a tough night for Argentina's Lionel Messi, regularly described as the best player of all-time, who was unable to score in what is likely to be his last World Cup fi

item.title: Kwara Lawmaker Seeks Stronger Laws Against Online Abuse, Digital Violence
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Nigeria’s youngest serving lawmaker, Hon. Rukayat Shittu, has called for a review of Nigeria’s laws on online abuse, cyberstalking, cyberbullying, image-based violence and other forms of digital harassment.   Shittu, who represents Owode/Onire Constituency in th

item.title: Sean ‘Diddy’ Combs sells $55 million Miami mansion he tried to use for bail
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Disgraced music mogul Sean “Diddy” Combs has finally sold the Miami mansion he once put up as collateral in his failed bid for bail in his sex-trafficking case. It was sold for $55 million while he was behind bars.

item.title: WAFCON 2026: Super Falcons step up preparations as 19 players hit camp
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Nineteen players are now in the Super Falcons camp in Casablanca ahead of the 2026 Women’s Africa Cup of Nations, DAILY POST reports. Six more players, including Michelle Alozie, Deborah Abiodun, Gift Monday, Esther Okoronkwo, Folashade Ijamilusi, and Uchenna Kanu are expected at the team&#821

item.title: Nigeria: Super Falcons seal new friendly after Ghana clash collapse, WAFCON plans back on track
item.dc:creator: Soccernet NG
item.description: Nigeria's Super Falcons will now take on Tanzania's Twiga Stars after their planned pre-2026 Women's Africa Cup of Nations (WAFCON) friendly against Ghana was cancelled at the last minute, Soccernet.ng reports. The match will serve as Nigeria's final warm-up before the tournament begins in Morocco o

item.title: Charity Ekezie Has Been Added To The YNaija Masterlist
item.dc:creator: YNaija
item.description: Charity Ekezie is a journalist, content creator and former radio host. Before becoming a TikTok creator in 2020 during the pandemic, Charity began her career as a radio host, a title she held for three years alongside working as an entrepreneur.  Her first video to go viral on TikTok featured h

item.title: INEC To Begin PVC Distribution For Osun Gov’ship Election Wednesday
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) has announced the commencement of the collection of Permanent Voter Cards (PVCs) for eligible voters ahead of the August 15, 2026, Osun State governorship election. The Commission said the exercise is meant for persons who registered, applied for

item.title: Bonds unsettled as oil and gas climb, earnings loom for AI
item.dc:creator: Yahoo Finance

item.title: CardinalStone Partners wins double honours at the 2026 Euromoney Awards for Excellence
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: CardinalStone Partners, Nigeria’s leading independent investment banking and multi-asset management firm, has been recognised with two of the industry’s highest honours at the 2026 Euromoney Awards for Excellence, winning Nigeria’s Best Investment Bank for M&A and Nigeria&#8217

item.title: ‘Full House’ creator Jeff Franklin relists $45 million Beverly Hills home built on site of Manson murders
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “Full House” creator Jeff Franklin is once again on the hunt for a buyer for his Beverly Hills mansion which has sinister ties to the Charles Manson murders.

item.title: Busha Business Collaborates with Tether to Expand Stablecoin Infrastructure for African Businesses
item.dc:creator: Techpoint Africa
item.description: Busha Business, the B2B infrastructure arm of Busha, has collaborated...

item.title: NBTE Boss Hails Katsina For First Hausa-Translated Technical Training Manuals
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: He described the initiative as the first of its kind in Nigeria and praised Governor Dikko Radda's administration for revitalising the Katsina Youth Craft Village through an investment of over ₦5 billion. The post NBTE Boss Hails Katsina For First Hausa-Translated Technical Training Manuals appeared

item.title: Why Nigeria’s entertainment viewership declines — Tofehinti
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Chief Executive Officer of NolliStream, Olu Oluwa Tofehinti, has identified expensive data and poor internet connectivity as some of the challenges affecting the entertainment industry. The post Why Nigeria’s entertainment viewership declines — Tofehinti appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: Watch: Super Eagles star and Cardi B spark dating rumours during luxury dinner
item.dc:creator: Soccernet NG
item.description: Super Eagles goalkeeper Maduka Okoye and American artist Cardi B have sparked rumors that they are dating after a fresh video of them emerged, Soccernet.ng reports. ​Over the past few months, Okoye has been the crush of many women. The 6-foot-6 player is very good-looking, and fans frequently take t

item.title: Lagos set for Structured On-Street Parking as LASPA calls for responsible parking culture
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Lagos State Parking Authority (LASPA) has stressed the need for responsible parking across, reaffirming its commitment to creating a safer, more orderly, and efficient parking system across the state. The post Lagos set for Structured On-Street Parking as LASPA calls for responsible parking cult

item.title: Government-backed creator platform aims to tame content flood
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: Thousands of songs are uploaded daily by Nigerian artists with little metadata or management support, but a new government-enabled national read more Government-backed creator platform aims to tame content flood
